global_theme: The escalating Middle East conflict is causing oil prices to surge above $100, fueling global inflation fears and stock market drops, significantly impacting European energy markets and consumer wealth.

g1: Global energy prices are volatile, impacting business costs and consumer spending in Portugal.
Inflationary pressures are rising; protect capital via inflation-resistant assets or services.
Stock markets face headwinds; avoid speculation, prioritize stable income streams for your business.
Geopolitical events dictate market sentiment; maintain liquidity for downturns or opportunities.
Luxury and wellness niches can still thrive during broader economic uncertainty.
g2: AI disrupts VC; leverage AI for market research and strategic business planning.
Geothermal energy attracts investment; explore green tech skills for future-proofing your business.
Shift to decentralized content (RSS) implies mastering direct communication channels.
Learn CLI tools (e.g., Mcp2cli) for efficient API automation, saving time and resources.
Understand user consent and TOS implications for any online service Alex develops.
g3: Portugal's shifting political landscape could affect local business policies; stay informed.
EU markets are volatile; prioritize local income generation to mitigate external shocks.
Housing tax incentives in Portugal suggest opportunities in real estate related services.
Sines is a new energy/digital engine; investigate local partnerships or service provision.
Support for women (APAV) suggests market for community-focused services in Portugal.

learning_task: Spend 30 minutes researching how solopreneurs in Portugal can hedge against rising energy costs and inflation, specifically looking into service pricing strategies or local energy efficiency grants to protect your €35k goal.
biz_opportunity: Launch a premium, bespoke "wellness experience" consulting service for affluent residents in Portugal, capitalizing on the resilient high-end luxury market and local offerings despite economic volatility.
